penalties.description: Maximum time reached before both suture ends were cut inside the trainer.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reports incomplete task due to missing suture cutting phase, while GPT reports completion at 145 seconds. Given that Claude specifically notes the video ends without showing both suture ends being cut inside the trainer, and this is a required completion criterion, the incomplete task determination takes precedence. The automatic zero score applies for incomplete tasks regardless of other performance aspects.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that the task was incomplete due to missing final cutting phase is more consistent with the rubric requirement that both suture ends must be cut inside the trainer for completion.

claude_value.description: Maximum time reached before both suture ends were cut inside the trainer.

gpt_value.description: Visible residual slit gap after the final knot.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic zero condition that supersedes other penalty assessments. If the cutting phase was not observed, the task cannot be considered complete regardless of slit closure quality.
Consistent with Claude's assessment that the cutting phase was not observed in the video, supporting the incomplete task determination.
Incomplete tasks receive automatic zero scores regardless of time performance or other factors.
